title: NATIONAL CHANGE OF ADDRESS
name: NATIONAL CHANGE OF ADDRESS
statement_of_work: POSTING AMENDMENT 1 to correct the due time for Line 4, Submission of Quotes (page 4) in RFO, Section I, Subsection D, Key Action Dates.   Changes are shown in red.  All other terms and conditions remain the same.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the NATIONAL CHANGE OF ADDRESS solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
description:
POSTING AMENDMENT 1 to correct the due time for Line 4, Submission of Quotes (page 4) in RFO, Section I, Subsection D, Key Action Dates.   Changes are shown in red.  All other terms and conditions remain the same.

The Contractor will provide file-based National Change of Address (NCOA) services, including all the task required to update CA DMV Records received with address changes from the United States Postal Service NCOA database, address standardization, zip + 4 codes, and delivery point barcodes, via electronic delivery as described in RFO Section III, Statement of Work.

unspsc_codes.description: Public Utilities & Public Sector Related Srvcs - Information srvcs - Info centers - Online database information retrieval systems
